title:
Bread Cat 🐾🍞
#cat #kitten #klingai
prompt_text: A surreal kitchen scene featuring an orange ginger cat sitting in a metal bread loaf pan. The cat's body is seamlessly morphed with a golden-brown loaf of bread. A person's hands appear, sprinkling white flour over the cat-loaf and then gently rubbing the flour into its fur and the bread surface. The background shows a kitchen counter with a kettle and cooking utensils in soft, warm indoor lighting.

prompt_data.sceneDescription: A surreal kitchen scene featuring an orange ginger cat sitting in a metal bread loaf pan. The cat's body is seamlessly morphed with a golden-brown loaf of bread. A person's hands appear, sprinkling white flour over the cat-loaf and then gently rubbing the flour into its fur and the bread surface. The background shows a kitchen counter with a kettle and cooking utensils in soft, warm indoor lighting.

cinematography.cameraShot: Medium close-up, vertical orientation, static shot at a slightly high angle.

actions: A person's hand sprinkles a generous amount of flour onto the cat-bread hybrid.
The cat blinks and twitches its ears as flour lands on its face.
The person uses both hands to gently rub and pat the flour across the top of the 'loaf'.
The cat remains calm and stationary within the pan throughout the process.
dialogue: [Ambient kitchen sounds: soft rustling of flour and rhythmic rubbing sounds against the fur/bread]
